project.name: bay-noise
project.description: Preact SPA — personal Bay Area show radar. Vite + Tailwind v4 + Cloudflare Pages.

rules: Preact, not React. import { h } from 'preact'.
Tailwind v4 utility classes only. No custom CSS.
Pure functions in src/lib/. Side effects only in prefs.ts (localStorage).
One useEffect for data fetch in app.tsx. No context/store/router.
Dark mode via class='dark' on <html>. System preference only.
TODO(port): for uncertainty. NOTE(port): for intentional oddities.
